license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pendjde
title: El-cheep-o bacterial DNA isolation / miniprep
author: Magdalena M Julkowska

steps_raw.instruction: Spin 3ml of the overnight culture to pellet cells (1.5 ml per time) @13000 rpm for 5 min
Add 250 ul of P1 solution + Rnase 5ul and vortex to resuspend the cells
Add 250 ul of P2 solution and mix gently
Add 350 ul of P3 solution and mix gently
Spin @ the max speed for 10 min
Take 750 ul of the supernatant and put in a new eppendorf tube. Add 750 ul of isopropanol
Remove the supernatant. Wash with 80% EtOH
Dry the pellet @ room temperature for 10 min. Remove the remaining EtOH
Add 50 ul of sterile / MiliQ water
Measure the DNA concentration using NanoDrop and store the DNA @ -20°C
